creator: romain@blogreen.org
text:
These changes make the port definitively simpler.  There are some ports
like this one which are in the BSD# repository and are really old, and
for which I just do minor changes for updating.  I really should go
through all of them and do such refactoring.

I would just prefer to keep the "PORTREVISION=1" so that version
numbering between the BSD# repo and FreeBSD ports stay in sync (and so
if somebody stops to merge the BSD# repos in his local tree he does not
miss updates).

Thanks!

Romain, on behalf of the BSD# Team.

-- 
Romain Tartière <romain@blogreen.org>        http://romain.blogreen.org/
pgp: 8DAB A124 0DA4 7024 F82A  E748 D8E9 A33F FF56 FF43 (ID: 0xFF56FF43)
(plain text =non-HTML= PGP/GPG encrypted/signed e-mail much appreciated)
